name: ~ Be Not Afraid ~
description:
[ Only the most faithful or most virtuous can accept this great undertaking. If you are neither, well, God still seems to have a plan for you. ]

You can take as much time as you want to get used to Libidathel. You may toy with him, you may dine with him, you may speak with him. God does not judge the hesitance of this extreme responsibility placed upon you.

…after all his penis does look like this.
creator: Cobelat
